support.notes: The macOS adapter has completed automated and real-device acceptance. Windows and Linux adapters are not implemented.

transports.notes: ATVV control and 16 kHz compressed voice frames are handled by the current macOS adapter.
Button reports and the hardware microphone-key F5 edge are handled through IOHID on macOS.

protocols.notes: The current adapter implements capability negotiation, microphone control, IMA/DVI ADPCM decode, and strict session gates.

platforms.notes: Universal build; current real-device acceptance was performed on Apple Silicon.
No Open Voice Bridge Windows adapter has been implemented.
No Open Voice Bridge Linux adapter has been implemented.
